summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Russian restaurant management system. Backend API working excellently (94.4% success rate), but critical frontend admin panel issues found due to missing component imports.

minor_issues.issue: PUT request requires all fields including 'number' even for partial updates
minor_issues.impact: Update table functionality requires sending all fields

minor_issues.issue: PUT request requires all fields including 'name' even for partial updates
minor_issues.impact: Update employee functionality requires sending all fields

ui_bugs.issue: Critical React error - HelpCircle component not defined
Multiple missing component imports causing runtime errors

integration_issues.issue: Entire admin panel fails to load due to missing imports

passed_tests: Categories CRUD operations (except minor update issue)
Menu items CRUD operations (except minor update issue)
Staff calls creation and status updates
Client menu item browsing by categories
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix missing component imports in frontend. The admin panel is completely broken due to missing imports like HelpCircle from lucide-react. All admin functionality (Profile, Menu, Orders, Settings, Help, Support pages) is inaccessible. Client menu works perfectly. Backend API is excellent with 94.4% success rate.
